description:
GOAL: Prepare the typer surface for IR-shaped reintegration. Keep the set-theoretic algebra (types.rs, 1388 LOC) and the pure helpers in typer.rs that the IR driver will reuse. Remove the AST-walking driver — its replacement is .11.24.2.

## Why this is atomic

Today typer.rs and types.rs build but no live caller imports them. After this ticket, the same files build (still no live caller — that arrives in .11.24.2), but the surface is pruned to exactly what the IR-shaped driver will consume. The repo stays green; cargo test still passes.

## Deliverables

src/typer.rs:
- DELETE: `Typer` struct's AST-walking machinery (per_fn cache, env stack), `Typer::type_program`, `Typer::infer`, any private helpers that exist only to support those two. All authorized for removal by the .11.24 design comment.
- KEEP: `pattern_type`, `pattern_bindings`, `tuple_projections`, `expr_to_map_key`, `pattern_to_map_key`, `map_field_lookup`, `refine_map_field`, `list_element_type`, `widen` (and all its private helpers `widen_*`), `specialize_return`, `expr_calls_self`.
- Strip any `Value::Jit*` references in survivor helpers.

src/types.rs:
- No code changes. Algebra is pipeline-independent.

src/jit.rs / src/aot.rs / src/test_support.rs (cfg-disabled):
- No code changes. Stale references inside cfg(any()) bodies are not compiled and serve as historical record.

## Tests

- All existing tests in typer.rs's pure-helper test module continue to pass (pattern_type, pattern_bindings, widen, specialize_return, etc.).
- AST-driver tests deleted alongside the driver. Authorized.
- types.rs algebra tests untouched, still pass.

## Out of scope

- Any IR work — the IR-shaped driver is .11.24.2.
- Any consumer wiring — those are .11.24.4 / .11.24.5 / .11.24.6 / .11.24.7.

## Dependencies

- BLOCKED BY: none.
- BLOCKS: fz-ul4.11.24.2.
title: Salvage typer: keep algebra + pure helpers, remove AST-shaped driver
